reviews.review_description: Is it a gorilla tag?

Hello, if you are reading the reviews then cool but I want to say asking for mod will not work. People who ask have a 0% chance of getting it. Enjoy DodgeVr. 

-soap (moderator)

1)if you like a game with more little kids than any other game play this one if you don’t then don’t play it this game is full of little kids 
2)a rule that says no cussing if your trying to make a little kid game then make a app not a vr game because vr is for 13 and up you should expect cussing 
3)the game isn’t  mostly what the title says but it still has dodge ball it doesn’t really work 
4)the moderators in this game are kinda abusing there power but they don’t really show it also if you join their discord and say that the something is bad or something they will mute you for speaking out I’ve seen it happen 
5)the community is fine it’s just full of little kids if you join the game you would most likely find a little kid playing it (means something different from number 1) 
6)most of the reviews are little kids probably idk 
7) i probably might get ban from the discord for speaking out 
8) don’t join the discord 👍
